reply:
(1) This is an Allen-Bradley Micro820 Programmable Logic Controller (PLC). It's used to control and monitor industrial processes.

(2) The most likely cause of the intermittent analog noise is a power supply or the analog input module. The voltage is 24VDC, which is standard for this model.

(3) The tech should check the power supply and the analog input module for any Micro820 PLC. Ensure the power supply is stable and the analog input module is correctly connected and functioning.
